stemHtml: In an instrument approach procedure, where does the initial approach segment begin and end?

options.a: From the Initial Approach Fix (IAF) to the Intermediate Fix (IF).
options.b: From the Intermediate Fix (IF) to the Final Approach Fix (FAF).
options.c: From the First Fix (FF) to the Intermediate Fix (IF).
options.d: From the Initial Approach Fix (IAF) to the Final Approach Fix (FAF).
